overview.title: Arduino Resources
overview.description: A guide to Arduino boards, sensors, modules, and components for embedded systems and IoT projects

boards.name: Arduino Uno R4 WiFi
boards.shortDesc: Latest Arduino Uno with WiFi, Bluetooth 5.0, and 32-bit ARM Cortex-M4 processor
boards.fullDescription: The Arduino Uno R4 WiFi represents a significant upgrade to the iconic Uno platform, featuring a powerful 32-bit ARM Cortex-M4 microcontroller running at 48 MHz. It includes built-in WiFi and Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity via an ESP32-S3 module, a 12x8 LED matrix, and enhanced memory capacity. Maintains 5V logic for shield compatibility.

codeSnippet.title: Blink LED Example

tutorials.title: Getting Started with Arduino Uno R4 WiFi

boards.name: Arduino Nano Every
boards.shortDesc: Compact board with ATMega4809 processor, 50% more memory, perfect for space-constrained projects
boards.fullDescription: The Arduino Nano Every is an evolution of the classic Nano, featuring the more powerful ATMega4809 processor with 50% more program memory and 200% more RAM than the standard Uno. Its small footprint (45x18mm) makes it ideal for wearables, compact projects, and embedded applications.

codeSnippet.title: Analog Read Example

boards.name: Arduino Mega 2560
boards.shortDesc: High I/O count board with 54 digital pins, ideal for complex projects like 3D printers
boards.fullDescription: The Arduino Mega 2560 is designed for projects requiring extensive I/O capabilities. With 54 digital I/O pins, 16 analog inputs, and multiple serial ports, it's perfect for complex applications like 3D printers, CNC machines, and automation systems.

codeSnippet.title: Multiple Serial Ports

components.name: DHT11 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
components.shortDesc: Low-cost digital temperature and humidity sensor with ±2°C accuracy
components.fullDescription: The DHT11 is a basic, low-cost digital temperature and humidity sensor. It uses a capacitive humidity sensor and a thermistor to measure the surrounding air, and outputs a digital signal on the data pin. Easy to use with any microcontroller.

pinout.Pin 2 (DATA): Digital data output (connect to digital pin)

wiring.DATA: Arduino Digital Pin (e.g., D2) with 10kΩ pull-up resistor

codeSnippet.title: DHT11 Reading Example

components.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
components.shortDesc: Ultrasonic ranging module for distance measurement from 2cm to 400cm
components.fullDescription: The HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor uses sonar to determine distance to an object. It offers excellent non-contact range detection with high accuracy and stable readings. Perfect for obstacle avoidance, distance measurement, and robotics applications.

codeSnippet.title: Distance Measurement

components.name: SG90 Micro Servo Motor
components.shortDesc: Compact 9g servo motor with 180° rotation, ideal for robotics and control systems
components.fullDescription: The SG90 is a lightweight, affordable micro servo motor perfect for RC aircraft, robots, and automation projects. It provides precise position control with 180-degree rotation and operates on standard PWM signals from Arduino.

wiring.Red: External 5V power supply (recommended for multiple servos)

codeSnippet.title: Servo Sweep Example

components.name: 16x2 LCD Display with I2C
components.shortDesc: 16 character x 2 line LCD display with I2C interface for easy connection
components.fullDescription: The 16x2 LCD display with I2C module is perfect for displaying text data from Arduino projects. The I2C interface reduces wiring from 16 pins to just 4 (VCC, GND, SDA, SCL), making it ideal for projects with limited pins.

specifications.Backlight: Blue or Green with adjustable contrast

codeSnippet.title: LCD Display Example

components.name: HC-SR501 PIR Motion Sensor
components.shortDesc: Passive Infrared sensor for detecting motion up to 7 meters away
components.fullDescription: The HC-SR501 PIR sensor detects motion by measuring changes in infrared radiation. It's perfect for security systems, automatic lighting, and presence detection. Features adjustable sensitivity and trigger time delay.

codeSnippet.title: PIR Motion Detection

components.name: OLED Display SSD1306 128x64
components.shortDesc: 0.96 inch OLED display with 128x64 resolution and I2C interface
components.fullDescription: The SSD1306 OLED display module offers high contrast, self-illuminating pixels, and low power consumption. No backlight required as each pixel emits its own light. Perfect for displaying sensor data, menus, and graphics in compact projects.

codeSnippet.title: OLED Hello World

components.name: 28BYJ-48 Stepper Motor with ULN2003
components.shortDesc: 5V unipolar stepper motor with ULN2003 driver board, 2048 steps per revolution
components.fullDescription: The 28BYJ-48 is an affordable unipolar stepper motor with 64:1 gear reduction. Paired with the ULN2003 driver board, it provides precise position control perfect for robotics, CNC projects, and automated systems.

codeSnippet.title: Stepper Motor Control

components.name: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor (AM2302)
components.shortDesc: High-precision digital sensor with ±0.5°C accuracy and ±2% humidity accuracy
components.fullDescription: The DHT22 (AM2302) is an upgraded version of the DHT11, offering significantly better accuracy and wider measurement ranges. Ideal for professional weather stations and precision environmental monitoring applications.

wiring.DATA: Arduino Digital Pin (e.g., D2) with 10kΩ pull-up

codeSnippet.title: DHT22 Precision Reading

components.name: L298N Motor Driver Module
components.shortDesc: Dual H-bridge driver for controlling 2 DC motors or 1 stepper motor up to 2A
components.fullDescription: The L298N is a versatile motor driver using dual H-bridge circuits to control motor speed and direction. Supports PWM speed control and can drive two DCmotors independently or one bipolar stepper motor. Built-in voltage regulator and protection features.

codeSnippet.title: DC Motor Speed Control

components.name: HC-05 Bluetooth Module
components.shortDesc: Bluetooth 2.0 SPP module for wireless serial communication with 10m range
components.fullDescription: The HC-05 is a versatile Bluetooth module supporting both master and slave modes. Enables wireless communication between Arduino and smartphones, computers, or other Bluetooth devices. Configurable via AT commands with default 9600 baud rate.

pinout.RXD: Receive data from Arduino TX (needs voltage divider for 5V)

wiring.KEY: HIGH for AT mode, LOW for data mode

codeSnippet.title: Bluetooth Serial Communication

components.name: ESP8266 WiFi Module (NodeMCU)
components.shortDesc: WiFi-enabled microcontroller with Arduino IDE support for IoT projects
components.fullDescription: The NodeMCU ESP8266 is a powerful WiFi-enabled development board with integrated TCP/IP stack. Features 80MHz CPU, 4MB flash, and can be programmed directly via Arduino IDE. Perfect for IoT applications requiring internet connectivity.

wiring.Note: All GPIO are 3.3V - use level shifters for 5V devices

codeSnippet.title: WiFi Web Server

compatibleBoards: Standalone (can be programmed via Arduino IDE)

components.name: DS3231 Real-Time Clock Module
components.shortDesc: High-precision I2C RTC with temperature compensation and battery backup
components.fullDescription: The DS3231 is an extremely accurate real-time clock module with integrated temperature-compensated crystal oscillator (TCXO). Maintains accurate time even when main power is off via battery backup. Features two programmable alarms and ±2ppm accuracy.

codeSnippet.title: RTC Read Time and Temperature

components.name: 5V Relay Module
components.shortDesc: Electrically operated switch for controlling AC/DC loads up to 10A at 250V
components.fullDescription: The 5V relay module acts as an electronically controlled switch, allowing Arduino to safely control high-voltage AC or DC appliances. Features optoisolation for protection, LED indicators, and supports both normally open (NO) and normally closed (NC) configurations.

wiring.Load NO/NC: Other side based on default state

codeSnippet.title: Relay Control Example

components.name: RFID RC522 Module
components.shortDesc: 13.56MHz RFID reader/writer for M IFARE cards and tags with SPI interface
components.fullDescription: The RC522 RFID module enables reading and writing MIFARE cards and tags that comply with ISO 14443A standard. Operating at 13.56MHz with SPI communication, it's perfect for access control, attendance systems, and smart card applications.

codeSnippet.title: RFID Card Read Example

components.name: Analog Joystick Module (KY-023)
components.shortDesc: Dual-axis XY joystick with pushbutton, outputs 0-1023 analog values
components.fullDescription: The analog joystick module features two 10kΩ potentiometers for X and Y axis control plus an integrated pushbutton. Perfect for gaming, robotics control, and menu navigation with smooth analog input.

codeSnippet.title: Joystick Read Example

components.name: Rotary Encoder Module (KY-040)
components.shortDesc: 360° rotary encoder with pushbutton, 20 pulses per rotation for precise control
components.fullDescription: The KY-040 rotary encoder provides precise rotational input with 20 detents per full rotation. Generates 2-bit gray code signals for direction detection. Ideal for menu navigation, volume control, and parameter adjustment.

codeSnippet.title: Rotary Encoder with Interrupts

components.name: MQ-2 Gas Sensor Module
components.shortDesc: Detects LPG, smoke, alcohol, propane, hydrogen, methane, and CO with analog/digital output
components.fullDescription: The MQ-2 gas sensor uses a tin dioxide (SnO2) sensing element that changes resistance when exposed to combustible gases. Features adjustable sensitivity threshold and both analog and digital outputs for versatile gas detection applications.

specifications.Detectable Gases: LPG, smoke, alcohol, propane, hydrogen, methane, CO

codeSnippet.title: Gas Sensor Monitoring

components.name: Soil Moisture Sensor (YL-69)
components.shortDesc: Resistive soil moisture sensor with analog/digital output for irrigation automation
components.fullDescription: The YL-69 soil moisture sensor measures soil water content using two probes that measure electrical conductivity. Features adjustable threshold potentiometer and dual output modes. Essential for smart irrigation and plant monitoring systems.

codeSnippet.title: Soil Moisture Irrigation Control

components.name: IR Receiver Module (VS1838B)
components.shortDesc: 38kHz infrared receiver for remote control projects, supports NEC protocol
components.fullDescription: The VS1838B infrared receiver module decodes 38kHz IR signals from remote controls. Features built-in signal amplification, carrier demodulation, and EMI shielding. Compatible with NEC, RC5, and other common IR protocols.

codeSnippet.title: IR Remote Decoder

components.name: KY-037 Sound Sensor Module
components.shortDesc: Microphone sound detection sensor with analog and digital output for sound-activated projects
components.fullDescription: The KY-037 is a high-sensitivity microphone sound sensor that detects sound intensity. Features both analog output for measuring sound levels and digital output with adjustable threshold for sound-activated triggering. Perfect for voice-controlled devices, sound-reactive LEDs, and clap switches.

codeSnippet.title: Sound Detection Example

components.name: LDR (Light Dependent Resistor) Module
components.shortDesc: Photoresistor light sensor for detecting ambient light levels and day/night sensing
components.fullDescription: The LDR module uses a photoresistor to detect ambient light levels. Resistance decreases with increasing light intensity, making it perfect for automatic lighting systems, solar tracking, and day/night detection. Features adjustable sensitivity and both analog and digital outputs.

codeSnippet.title: Auto Light Control

components.name: BH1750 Digital Light Sensor
components.shortDesc: 16-bit digital ambient light sensor with I2C interface for precise lux measurement
components.fullDescription: The BH1750 is a digital ambient light sensor that directly outputs a digital value in lux (light intensity) via I2C communication. Unlike analog LDRs, it provides accurate, calibrated light measurements from 1-65535 lux, making it ideal for professional light metering and display brightness control.

codeSnippet.title: BH1750 Light Measurement

components.name: TCS3200 Color Recognition Sensor
components.shortDesc: RGB color sensor for detecting and identifying colors in robotics and sorting applications
components.fullDescription: The TCS3200 color sensor converts light-to-frequency and outputs a square wave with frequency proportional to light intensity. Features programmable color and full-scale output frequency, 8 LEDs for illumination, and can detect RGB values for color identification. Perfect for color sorting, line following robots, and quality control.

codeSnippet.title: RGB Color Reading

components.name: ACS712 Current Sensor Module
components.shortDesc: Hall effect current sensor for measuring AC/DC current up to 5A, 20A, or 30A
components.fullDescription: The ACS712 is a Hall effect-based linear current sensor that provides economical and precise AC or DC current sensing. Available in 5A, 20A, and 30A variants, it outputs an analog voltage proportional to the measured current. Perfect for power monitoring, motor control, and energy management systems.

wiring.Terminal: Wire to be measured passes through sensor

codeSnippet.title: Current Measurement Example

components.name: SW-420 Vibration Sensor Module
components.shortDesc: Motion vibration sensor for detecting shock, movement, and vibrations in alarm systems
components.fullDescription: The SW-420 vibration sensor module detects vibrations, shocks, and movements using a spring-type vibration switch. Features adjustable sensitivity and digital output that triggers when vibration is detected. Perfect for anti-theft alarms, earthquake detectors, and impact sensing applications.

codeSnippet.title: Vibration Alarm System

components.name: Rain Sensor Module (FC-37 / YL-83)
components.shortDesc: Water detection sensor for rain detection, irrigation control, and moisture sensing
components.fullDescription: The rain sensor module detects water droplets and moisture levels on its sensing board. Features both analog output (intensity of rain) and digital output (threshold detection) with adjustable sensitivity. Essential for automatic window closers, irrigation systems, and weather monitoring.

wiring.Sensor: Connect to module via 3.5mm jack or wire

codeSnippet.title: Rain Detection System

components.name: Flame Sensor Module (IR-based)
components.shortDesc: Infrared flame detection sensor for fire alarm systems and safety applications
components.fullDescription: The flame sensor module uses an infrared photodiode to detect flames by sensing the specific wavelengths emitted by fire (760nm-1100nm). Features adjustable sensitivity and can detect flames up to 1 meter away. Essential for fire alarm systems, robot firefighting, and industrial safety applications.

specifications.Distance: Up to 1 meter (depends on flame size)

codeSnippet.title: Fire Alarm System

components.name: MAX30102 Heart Rate & SpO2 Sensor
components.shortDesc: Pulse oximeter sensor for measuring heart rate and blood oxygen saturation levels
components.fullDescription: The MAX30102 is an integrated pulse oximetry and heart-rate monitor module. It combines red and IR LEDs with a photodetector to measure heart rate and blood oxygen saturation (SpO2) by detecting subtle changes in blood volume. Perfect for fitness wearables, medical monitoring, and health tracking devices.

codeSnippet.title: Heart Rate & SpO2 Reading

components.name: R307 Optical Fingerprint Scanner
components.shortDesc: Optical fingerprint recognition module for biometric security and access control
components.fullDescription: The R307 is an optical fingerprint scanner module with built-in image processing and template matching. Can store up to 1000 fingerprints in internal flash memory with fast recognition speed (<0.5s). Features UART communication and is perfect for door locks, safes, and biometric attendance systems.

codeSnippet.title: Fingerprint Enrollment & Verification

components.name: HX711 Load Cell Amplifier + Load Cell
components.shortDesc: 24-bit ADC for precision weight measurement with strain gauge load cells
components.fullDescription: The HX711 is a precision 24-bit analog-to-digital converter designed specifically for weighing scales and load cell amplification. When combined with a strain gauge load cell (available in 1kg, 5kg, 10kg, 20kg, 50kg variants), it provides accurate weight measurements. Perfect for digital scales, force measurement, and industrial weighing applications.

specifications.Load Cell Input: Differential (E+, E-, A+, A-, B+, B-)

codeSnippet.title: Digital Scale Example

components.name: KY-026 Flame Sensor Module
components.shortDesc: IR flame detection sensor with both analog and digital output for fire safety
components.fullDescription: The KY-026 is an infrared-based flame detection sensor module that can detect flames and light sources within the infrared spectrum (760-1100nm). Features adjustable sensitivity potentiometer, dual output modes, and can detect flames up to 80cm away. Ideal for robot firefighting and fire alarm applications.

codeSnippet.title: Advanced Flame Detection
